label: ROSWELL
tag: July 1947 — the foundation myth. USAAF recovered 'disc' debris near Roswell, NM.

label: WASH FLAP
tag: July 1952 — unidentified radar contacts over Washington D.C. on two consecutive weekends.

label: HILL ABDUCTION
tag: September 1961 — Betty and Barney Hill's widely publicized abduction account in New Hampshire.

label: RENDLESHAM
tag: December 1980 — UK forest incident near RAF Woodbridge; multiple servicemember witnesses.

label: PHOENIX LIGHTS
tag: March 1997 — V-formation of lights over Phoenix, AZ observed by thousands.

label: TIC-TAC
tag: November 2004 — USS Nimitz carrier group radar + video of fast-moving oblong object.

label: GIMBAL
tag: January 2015 — second Navy FLIR video released to the public in 2017.

label: GRUSCH
tag: June 2023 — David Grusch's Congressional testimony on alleged non-human craft recovery programs.
